_comment: Pi 4B 4GB profile. Qwen3 0.6B Q4 for chat/classification, GTE-large FP16 for embeddings. ctx_size kept modest to leave headroom for KV cache + Node + vector DB. Bump ctx_size to 4096 only after smoke test confirms RAM headroom.

config.system_prompt: You are Panki, a BPOM regulatory assistant. Answer in JSON when asked. Never invent regulation numbers.
